title: The Wither gains dice and modifier against Fear-equipped target

card.rawText: If this card attacks a creature that has the magic card "Fear" equipped to it, add Atk Dice Rolls +2 and Modifier +2.

effect.value: If this card attacks a creature that has the magic card "Fear" equipped to it, add Atk Dice Rolls +2 and Modifier +2.

plan.title: The Wither gains dice and modifier against Fear-equipped target
plan.summary: Attack a creature equipped with Fear and verify Atk Dice Rolls +2 and Modifier +2 are represented.

notes: Read text first: If this card attacks a creature that has the magic card "Fear" equipped to it, add Atk Dice Rolls +2 and Modifier +2.

steps: Equip Fear to the opposing primary.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.
